message:
fix(distributed): reject trailing bytes in snapshot deserialization

RegionSnapshot::from_bytes() previously accepted snapshots with extra
bytes after the valid payload, silently ignoring them. Now checks
cursor.remaining() == 0 after decoding and returns the new
SnapshotError::TrailingBytes variant if data remains.

This hardens the deserialization against truncated-then-appended
payloads, version-mismatch forward-compat data, and fuzzer inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
